downloaded_assets.title: Neural Network Abstraction
downloaded_assets.description: Visualizing complex neural networks in a clean, scientific 3D style
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A high-fidelity 3D render of a neural network architecture. Transparent glass-like layers containing blue circular nodes and complex line connections. Minimalist white background with soft shadows, creating a premium laboratory feel.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant white and soft blue. Clean aesthetic that won't compete with UI text.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: 3D visualization of neural network layers in a high-tech digital lab environment
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfect conceptual fit for an ML showcase. It looks professional and educational rather than like generic stock.

downloaded_assets.title: Machine Learning Lab Workspace
downloaded_assets.description: Physical workstations used for research and development
downloaded_assets.visual_description: An open lab workspace with high-end monitors, industrial hardware components, and organized electronic equipment. Bright, even lighting and professional laboratory setting.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Neutral grays and blacks with minor accent colors. Fits well with standard light-mode UI.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Modern computer workstations in a high-tech research and development lab
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Good alternative for a grounded 'real-world research' feel.

downloaded_assets.title: Cancer Research Lab
downloaded_assets.description: Scientist analyzing medical samples on a microscope linked to a computer
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A researcher in a white lab coat using a professional microscope. A laptop next to them shows digital pathology slides with cell structures.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Cool blues and sterile whites. Clinical look.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Researcher using a microscope to analyze medical samples for breast cancer classification
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Strong visual link to the 'Breast Cancer' project, showing the intersection of medical science and data.

downloaded_assets.title: Nutrition Analysis
downloaded_assets.description: Identifying healthy food options on a nutritional chart
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Close-up of a hand pointing to various vegetables on a printed nutritional chart. Fresh tomatoes and other produce are visible on the table surface.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Natural greens and reds against a neutral stone-like background.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: A hand pointing to vegetables on a nutritional chart, representing healthy lifestyle choices
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly represents the Obesity project context: monitoring health and nutrition.

downloaded_assets.title: Geometric Data Texture
downloaded_assets.description: Abstract intersecting lines suggesting data flow and structure
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A dense mesh of fine white and gray intersecting lines on a neutral background, forming a crystalline or grid-like structure. Very low contrast and high-key.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Very pale grays. Ideal for background overlays at low opacity.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Abstract background of intersecting lines suggesting data structures and networks
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Provides professional 'depth' to UI sections without being distracting.

downloaded_assets.title: scikit-learn logo
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Orange and blue interlocking circles logo

css_textures.description: Subtle dot grid pattern for a professional developer/scientific aesthetic

usage_notes: Use 'hero-neural-abstraction.png' for the primary hero section to maintain a modern scientific mood.
The 'bg-geometric-lines.jpg' texture should be used as a background for sections with light overlays (e.g. opacity 10-20%) to add visual depth.
Prefer react-icons/si icons for integration chips, but use the downloaded 'logo-*' PNGs if high-fidelity full-color branding is needed.
